creator: navel@wp.pl
text:
Please forgive me, but I just hate downloading couple iso images(CD iso images) while I could download just one(1) iso-dvd image. And wouldn't fan with CD's while freebsd was being installed.
Briefly: Instead of couple cd's iso's please make one dvd image.
Could you be so kind and change it(not only for me).

Fix: 

One dvd iso, not couple cd iso's.
